title: Finite Shortest Path Certificates

solver_reuse.target: finite shortest-path replay and potential-certificate theorem boundary
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact replay checks one path length, one feasible shortest-path potential certificate, one malformed path-distance row, and one claimed-shorter-distance violation; no source solver artifact is committed yet, so this is not a solver regression or benchmark claim.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote only after adding a source exact-arithmetic artifact and checked proof route for path length, edge relaxation, or dual potential conflicts; keep general shortest-path algorithms, negative-cycle theory, and asymptotic runtime in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Replay finite directed weighted graphs, path adjacency, and path length over exact rationals.
Replay finite potential certificates by checking every edge relaxation inequality.
Reject malformed rows by recomputing a path length or by comparing a claimed shorter distance against the potential lower bound.
Add a source exact-arithmetic artifact and checked certificate route before promoting the pack as a solver regression.
Keep arbitrary-graph shortest-path correctness, negative-cycle reasoning, all-pairs algorithms, and asymptotic complexity as Lean/theorem horizons until proof artifacts exist.
